title: [Cobblemon] PokeClash+
description: Includes everything you need to jump straight into the PokeClash Cobblemon server without extra setup, including performance optimizations. + A collection of visual upgrades and quality of life additions.
body:
## Note: This modpack is in BETA and is not intended for low-end computers, some settings can be adjusted to work better on your system, but it will take away from the overall experience. Use our [regular modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pokeclash-cobblemon) for a more stable solution.

About This Modpack:

This modpack is designed to optimize your gameplay when playing on the PokeClash Cobblemon server. We have an awesome community, and some great features to enhance your cobblemon experience. See our server features and pack contents below!

Server Features - Dex Ranks - All Pokemons modeled - Player Markets - Player Warps - Land Claiming - Breeding with Daycare - Mega Evos - Mega Raid Bosses - Pokehunts - PokeBuilder - Custom Pokemon Skins - Fakemon - WonderTrade - Community PokeTasks - Cobblemon Community Leaderboards - GTS - Player Gym Leaders - Legendary Spawns - Keep Inventory - Resource World - Cosmetics - Custom Terrain Generation - Server Events - Cobblemon Rider - EV Training NPCs - PokeFishing - Catch Combos - Ranked Battles (with ELO)
![Divider](https://i.ibb.co/rF0wK96/divider.png "Divider") Have any questions or want to get to know our players? Come join our community! [![https://discord.gg/pokeclash](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/1075503850896764948/widget.png?style=banner3)](http://discord.gg/pokeclash "http://discord.gg/pokeclash") ![Divider](https://i.ibb.co/rF0wK96/divider.png "Divider")
QoL Mods - Advancement Info - AppleSkin - Better Ping Display - Better Third Person - Borderless Mining - Capes - **CIT Resewn** (needed to see server cosmetics) - Cobblemon Integrations - **Cobblemounts** (needed to ride Pokémons) - Elytra Trims - Fancy Menu - Iris Shaders - Jade - Just Enough Items (JEI) - Keep The RecoursePack - Melody - Overflowing Bars - Shulkerbox Tooltips - Simple Discord RPC - Simple Voice Chat - Xaero's Minimap - Xaero's Worldmap - Zoomify
Performance Mods - Dynamic FPS - Lithium - Memory Leak Fix - Sodium - Sodium Extra
Included Resource Packs - Cobblemon Interface
![Divider](https://i.ibb.co/rF0wK96/divider.png "Divider")

Technical Details:

- Recommended to run with a minimum of 4 GB of memory. If your computer cannot handle that, use the base modpack instead. ![Divider](https://i.ibb.co/rF0wK96/divider.png "")
